purpose: Locked high-aesthetic style systems for Kenn PPT Deck Studio. Use during Gate 1 before any deck production.

globalRules.color: Choose one style id and map all CSS variables to its tokens. Never invent unrelated colors after the style is accepted.
globalRules.typography: Use Windows-safe stacks by default. Embedded or web fonts require user approval.
globalRules.density: Match density to deck type and talk rhythm; never let card count or paragraphs override slide readability.
globalRules.motion: Every style keeps semantic motion and a B low-power/static mode.
globalRules.sample: Style sample must show title, dense content, and chart/process slides before narrative work.

typography.windowsStack: Aptos, Segoe UI, Microsoft YaHei, Arial, sans-serif
typography.title: condensed sans or strong grotesk feeling; 48-86px; 0 letter spacing

density.textLimits: headline 1-2 lines; body 36-80 Chinese chars per block

graphics.diagram: callouts, arrows, numbered modules, section rulers
graphics.chart: flat bars, mission timelines, annotated matrices
graphics.imagery: technical stills, equipment crops, simple generated schematics

motion.background: slow blueprint drift or static paper grain
motion.entrance: section ruler draws first, then title, then modules
motion.lowPower: freeze drift; keep ruler state visible

typography.windowsStack: Segoe UI Variable, Segoe UI, Microsoft YaHei UI, Arial, sans-serif
typography.title: large clean sans; 56-104px; light-to-semibold weights

density.textLimits: one idea, one strong phrase, 3 bullets max

graphics.diagram: thin luminous arcs, product halos, reveal masks
graphics.chart: single KPI moments, clean axis-free deltas
graphics.imagery: product screenshot or rendered object must dominate
graphics.radiusShadow: 12-24px radius for stage objects; soft glow

motion.entrance: fade-rise with depth and scale under 1.03

typography.windowsStack: Arial, Helvetica, Segoe UI, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif
typography.title: bold grotesk; 52-98px; tight but non-negative spacing

density.cards: use bands and columns instead of cards

graphics.diagram: orthogonal arrows, numbered blocks, strong scale contrast
graphics.chart: flat bars, dot plots, quadrant maps
graphics.linework: black rules and blue/yellow signal marks

motion.entrance: hard masked slide-in aligned to grid

typography.windowsStack: Microsoft YaHei, DengXian, SimSun, Georgia, serif
typography.title: elegant serif/songer feeling; 48-88px
typography.body: readable CJK sans or Song-style serif; 21-30px

graphics.diagram: ink-line concept maps, margin callouts
graphics.chart: muted line charts and hand-annotated bars
graphics.imagery: warm document crops, classroom textures, subtle generated scenes

motion.background: slow paper grain, ink wash drift

typography.windowsStack: Segoe UI, Arial, Microsoft YaHei UI, sans-serif
typography.title: utilitarian sans; 48-86px; medium-bold

graphics.diagram: switches, scales, knobs as abstract UI metaphors
graphics.linework: strong dividers, rounded only where control-like

typography.windowsStack: Aptos, Segoe UI, Microsoft YaHei, Arial, sans-serif
typography.title: sharp sans; 44-80px

density.cards: 3-6 panels max, each with clear rank
density.textLimits: dense labels allowed; no paragraphs over 70 chars

graphics.diagram: market maps, terminal rows, heat strips
graphics.chart: small multiples, sparklines, heatmaps, KPI deltas

motion.background: slow ticker or scanline, very subtle
motion.easing: linear for ticker, cubic-bezier(.2,0,0,1) for UI

typography.windowsStack: Georgia, Cambria, Microsoft YaHei, SimSun, serif
typography.title: editorial serif; 46-84px
typography.body: serif body or clean sans labels; 20-29px

density.textLimits: short paragraphs acceptable, 2 max per slide

graphics.diagram: editorial annotations, source notes, callout boxes
graphics.chart: FT-style line/bar charts, clear baselines, source captions

motion.background: static or very slow paper grain
motion.entrance: headline then chart trace then annotation

typography.windowsStack: Segoe UI, Aptos, Microsoft YaHei UI, Arial, sans-serif
typography.title: hybrid serif/sans allowed; 50-90px; restrained

density.grid: lab grid, low opacity, broken into zones
density.textLimits: labels compact; teaching copy with strong hierarchy

graphics.diagram: pipelines, evaluation matrices, sensor-like charts
graphics.chart: radar only when meaningful; bars and matrices preferred
graphics.imagery: generated lab schematics, UI mock panels
graphics.texture: fine noise and light bloom under 8%
graphics.linework: thin cyan lines with amber warning points

motion.background: slow photon sweep and sparse grid shimmer
